cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So Jane quit her job on March 20, 2020, and 176 days have passed since then. We need to find out what tomorrow's date is in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe we can check which one fits. First, let me calculate the date 176 days after March 20, 2020. Then add one day to get tomorrow's date. Let's start by breaking down the days month by month. Starting from March 20, 2020. March has 31 days, so from March 20 to March 31 is 31 - 20 = 11 days left in March.
